page_content:
Prerequisite: ENAE641.

ENAE743 Applied Nonlinear Control of Aerospace Systems (3 Credits) Mathematics and methods of nonlinear systems analysis and nonlinear control design, including nonlinear models and phenomena, Lyapunov stability, input-output stability, passivity and frequency domain analysis, nonlinear controllability and observability, feedback linearization, sliding mode control, and integrator backstepping.
